pageDescription: See the deadline and order details before deciding. You can order as a secure guest and create an account later.
guestNameRequired: Enter at least two characters for your name.
guestPrivacy: Your guest access is limited to this order. Your private access secret stays on this device.
invalidInvite: This invitation is invalid, expired, revoked, or no longer available.
saveFailed: Your change could not be saved. Refresh and try again.
createAccount: Create or sign in to keep this order
accountBenefit: Link this guest order to your account without losing your selections.
accountLinked: Your guest order is now linked to your account.
guestExpired: Guest access expired. Ask the organizer for a new invitation.
